moments.title: The Open Championship Heats Up
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship continues its final rounds this weekend at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, Merseyside.

angles.name: Golf Action
angles.copy: It's moving day at Royal Birkdale! Who's making a charge for the Claret Jug at The Open Championship this weekend? #TheOpen

angles.name: Sunday Showdown
angles.copy: All eyes on Royal Birkdale for the final day of The Open Championship tomorrow. Who do you think will be lifting the Claret Jug?

moments.title: London Athletics Meet Today
moments.blurb: The Wanda Diamond League brings world-class athletics to the London Stadium today for the London Athletics Meet.

angles.name: Track & Field Thrills
angles.copy: The London Athletics Meet is happening at London Stadium today! Who are you cheering on for gold in the Diamond League? #LondonAthletics

angles.name: Best of British
angles.copy: World-class athletes are competing in London today for the Diamond League. Expect some incredible performances!

moments.title: Splendour Festival's Last Dance
moments.blurb: Nottingham's Splendour Festival is taking place this weekend (July 18-19) at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park, marking its final ever edition after 18 years.

angles.name: Festival Farewell
angles.copy: It's the FINAL EVER Splendour Festival in Nottingham this weekend! Who's there sending it off in style? #SplendourFestival

angles.name: Nottingham's Party
angles.copy: Two days of music and memories as Splendour Festival closes its gates for the last time at Wollaton Hall. What's been your favourite Splendour moment?

moments.title: New UK Singles Chart Number 1
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is the current Official UK Singles Chart Number 1, making it the longest-running British act's number one ever. Oasis's 'Wonderwall' has re-entered at Number 2.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are still holding strong at UK Number 1 with 'Rein Me In'! An incredible achievement for the British duo.

angles.name: Wonderwall's Return
angles.copy: What a comeback! Oasis's 'Wonderwall' is back in the UK Top 3 this week. Still sounds as good as it did in '95!

angles.name: Football Anthems
angles.copy: 'Three Lions' is climbing the charts again! Is it ever truly out of the Top 40 in summer?

moments.title: Brian May's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May turns 79 tomorrow, July 19th. He is known for his iconic guitar work and songwriting for the band.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Brian May of Queen tomorrow! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo? #BrianMay #Queen

angles.name: Queen's Sound
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May tomorrow! His riffs are timeless. #Queen

moments.title: Carlos Santana's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Iconic guitarist Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday on Monday, July 20th. His career spans decades with a unique blend of rock, Latin, and blues.

angles.name: Smooth Guitar
angles.copy: A very happy 79th birthday to the legendary Carlos Santana on Monday! Which Santana track gets you grooving? #Santana

angles.name: Timeless Sound
angles.copy: Wishing Carlos Santana a fantastic 79th birthday this Monday! His guitar has graced some truly classic hits. #CarlosSantana

moments.title: The Hundred Cricket Season Begins
moments.blurb: The Hundred, the fast-paced 100-ball cricket competition, kicks off its 2026 season on Tuesday, July 21st, with MI London facing Sunrisers Leeds at the Kia Oval.

angles.name: Cricket is Back
angles.copy: The Hundred returns this Tuesday! Get ready for fast-paced cricket action as the season gets underway. Which team are you backing? #TheHundred

angles.name: Welsh Fire
angles.copy: Get ready for The Hundred! Our very own Welsh Fire are in action this week. Who's excited for some 100-ball cricket? #WelshFire

moments.title: Don Henley's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Eagles co-founder and legendary drummer/vocalist Don Henley turns 79 on Wednesday, July 22nd. He's known for hits like 'Hotel California' and 'Boys of Summer'.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Don Henley of The Eagles this Wednesday! What's your favourite Eagles track? #DonHenley #Eagles

angles.name: Voice of a Generation
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic voice of Don Henley this Wednesday! From The Eagles to his solo hits, his music is timeless. #ClassicHits

moments.title: Latitude Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk from July 23-26, celebrating its 20th anniversary with headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Suffolk Festival
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is back in Henham Park this week! Who's heading to Suffolk for the 20th anniversary celebrations? #LatitudeFestival

angles.name: Big Names at Latitude
angles.copy: David Byrne, Teddy Swims, Lewis Capaldi and more are all heading to Latitude Festival from Thursday! Who are you most excited to see?

moments.title: Slash's 61st Birthday
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses' iconic guitarist Slash (Saul Hudson) celebrates his 61st birthday on Thursday, July 23rd. He's a rock legend known for his distinctive top hat and incredible riffs.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the one and only Slash from Guns N' Roses this Thursday! What's your favourite GNR track he shredded on? #Slash #GunsNRoses

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a rockin' 61st birthday to the legendary Slash on Thursday! From 'Sweet Child o' Mine' to 'November Rain', his guitar work is unforgettable. #GunsNRoses

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez's 57th Birthday
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on Friday, July 24th. The singer, actress, and dancer has had a massive influence on pop and R&B music.

angles.name: J.Lo Day
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the one and only J.Lo this Friday! What's your favourite Jennifer Lopez hit? #JenniferLopez #JLo

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a fabulous 57th birthday to Jennifer Lopez on Friday! From 'Jenny from the Block' to 'On the Floor', her career is full of anthems. #PopIcon

moments.title: Together Again Festival
moments.blurb: The Together Again Festival takes place from July 24-26, 2026, at Bolesworth Castle in Cheshire, promising a celebration of music, arts, and culture.

angles.name: Cheshire Festival
angles.copy: Together Again Festival kicks off this Thursday at Bolesworth Castle! Get ready for a weekend of music, arts and good vibes in Cheshire. #TogetherAgainFestival

angles.name: Dance & Rewind
angles.copy: From tech house to disco and UK garage classics, Together Again Festival has got the Rewind Arena calling your name this weekend!

moments.title: Festival of Sport Weekend
moments.blurb: The Festival of Sport takes place from July 24-27, 2026, at Packington Estate, offering families a chance to try various sports with legends.

angles.name: Family Sport Fun
angles.copy: The Festival of Sport starts this Thursday! A fantastic weekend for families to try new activities and learn from sporting legends. #FestivalOfSport

angles.name: Sporting Legends
angles.copy: Ever wanted to learn hockey from Olympians or rugby from international stars? The Festival of Sport this weekend is your chance!

moments.title: T100 Triathlon London
moments.blurb: The T100 Triathlon series comes to London on July 25-26, 2026, bringing elite triathlon action to the capital.

angles.name: Triathlon Challenge
angles.copy: The T100 Triathlon is in London this weekend! Witness incredible endurance as the world's best triathletes compete. #T100Triathlon

angles.name: Elite Athletes
angles.copy: Swim, bike, run! The T100 Triathlon series hits London this Saturday and Sunday. Who will conquer the course?

moments.title: Mick Jagger's 83rd Birthday
moments.blurb: The Rolling Stones' legendary frontman Mick Jagger turns 83 on Sunday, July 26th. He remains one of rock's most enduring and energetic performers.

angles.name: Rock'n'Roll Icon
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger this Sunday! Still got the moves like Jagger. What's your favourite Stones hit? #MickJagger #RollingStones

angles.name: Timeless Performer
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 83rd birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger on Sunday! Decades of incredible music and performances. #RollingStones

moments.title: Soulja Boy's 36th Birthday
moments.blurb: Rapper and producer Soulja Boy (DeAndre Cortez Way) celebrates his 36th birthday on Tuesday, July 28th. He rose to fame with his viral hit 'Crank That (Soulja Boy)'.

angles.name: Crank That
angles.copy: Happy 36th Birthday to Soulja Boy this Tuesday! Remember when 'Crank That' took over the world? #SouljaBoy #CrankThat

angles.name: Viral Pioneer
angles.copy: Wishing Soulja Boy a happy 36th birthday on Tuesday! He changed the game with his early viral success. What's your favourite of his tracks? #00sHipHop
